mission.title: vitess: RFC: New vexplain command having a format to glean information about vtgate and MySQL plans
mission.description: RFC: New vexplain command having a format to glean information about vtgate and MySQL plans. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current vitess deployment
steps.description:
Verify your vitess version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
helm list -n vitess 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working vitess installation.

steps.title: Review vitess configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
kubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess
```
### Description

We propose adding a new Vitess-specific command called `vexplain`, which extends the `explain` query that MySQL offers.

steps.title: Apply the fix for RFC: New vexplain command having a format to glean
steps.description:
In https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/issues/11621 we proposed adding a new Vitess-specific command called `vexplain`, which extends the `explain` query that MySQL offers. This PR does just that. :)

We are also deprecating `explain format=vitess` and `explain format=vtexplain`.

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
kubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "RFC: New vexplain command having a format to glean" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
In https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/issues/11621 we proposed adding a new Vitess-specific command called `vexplain`, which extends the `explain` query that MySQL offers. This PR does just that. :)

We are also deprecating `explain format=vitess` and `explain format=vtexplain`.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with vitess installed or the issue environment reproducible.
